title: Smoky Crumbly Canadian Pumpkin Seeds Pancakes
description: A Whole30-friendly, energizing breakfast featuring rice flour pancakes studded with toasted pumpkin seeds and a smoky bhuna spice blend.
instructions: Heat a non‑stick skillet or griddle over medium heat and lightly brush with melted coconut oil.
Whisk oat milk, apple cider vinegar, and maple syrup in a bowl; let sit 5 minutes to activate the baking soda.
In a separate bowl, combine rice flour with cumin, coriander, turmeric, smoked paprika, smoked sea salt, and ground ginger.
Pour the wet mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until smooth; fold in toasted pumpkin seeds.
Allow the batter to rest for 2 minutes while the skillet warms.
Pour 1/4 cup of batter onto the skillet for each pancake; cook until bubbles form and edges set, about 2–3 minutes.
Flip and cook the other side until golden brown, about 1–2 minutes.
Serve hot, drizzled with extra maple syrup and a sprinkle of remaining pumpkin seeds.
